scripts.build: npx tsc --build && npm run -w apps/web build
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/*/dist packages/*/dist && rm -f vitest.config.{js,d.ts,d.ts.map,js.map} tsconfig.base.tsbuildinfo apps/web/vite.config.d.ts && find apps packages -name '*.test.d.ts' -o -name '*.test.d.ts.map' -o -name '*.test.js' -o -name '*.test.js.map' | grep -v node_modules | xargs rm -f
